states.name: Bahamut
states.title: Doomsday Dragon God
states.description: The Dragon God's name is written in ancient legends. The leader of all dragons, the Bringer of the End - Bahamut. For a time, he was thought to be mere legend— the possibility that he might truly exist, a nightmare too horrible to contemplate. A single dragon can destroy a town; what would their god be capable of?

states.name: Bahamut
states.title: Doomsday Dragon God
states.description:
The Wyrm riseth from the abyss. He commandeth the flame of blight. His wings bring dark like unto blackest night. He heraldeth the end, not in a rebirth, but in the ruin of all that is.

—An ancient inscription

states.name: Bahamut
states.title: Doomsday Dragon God
states.description: At cataclysm's end, a single living being remains, an old man, his life fading fast. Through the flames and ash around him, he glimpses only the hint of a shadow,the suggestion of a titanic wing. For a moment, he sees the Dark Dragon God. But as his eyes cloud and close for the last time, he breathes a prophecy:"Someday, you, too, shall end..."
